creator: alepulver@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

The sysutils/fusefs-ntfs port installs a symlink in 
/usr/sbin/mount_ntfs-3g allowing the use of "ntfs-3g" type in /etc/fstab 
and "mount -t ntfs-3g". The only need is to have /usr mounted before the 
NTFS filesystem (otherwise a static binary would have to be created, or 
install libntfs-3g in /lib).
